title: sphenopholis glabra
intro: Sphenopholis glabra, also known as prairie dropseed, is a perennial grass native to North America, particularly in the Great Plains region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Sphenopholis glabra include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Sphenopholis glabra are typically made from its roots and rhizomes, and can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
